About AI Tools Hub

We're a team of developers and AI enthusiasts on a mission to cut through the noise and help you find the right AI tools for your workflow.

Our Mission

The AI tools landscape is overwhelming. New products launch every week, each claiming to be revolutionary. Developers need a reliable, no-nonsense resource to figure out what actually works.

That's why we built AI Tools Hub. Every review is based on hands-on testing in real projects. We don't accept payment for positive reviews, and we clearly disclose every affiliate relationship.

How We Test

🔬

Hands-On Testing

We use every tool in real development workflows for at least two weeks before writing a review. No reading marketing pages — we actually build things.

📊

Structured Evaluation

Each tool is scored on features, pricing, ease of use, performance, and support. We use the same criteria across all reviews for fair comparisons.

🔄

Regular Updates

AI tools change fast. We revisit our reviews every 3 months and update them when products release major features, change pricing, or significantly improve.

🎯

Developer Perspective

We write for developers, by developers. No marketing fluff, no buzzword salad. Just practical insights about what works and what doesn't.

Editorial Policy

No paid positive reviews. Our opinions are our own. Affiliate relationships never influence our ratings or recommendations.

Transparent disclosures. Every affiliate link is clearly marked. We earn a commission only when you purchase through our links — at no extra cost to you.

Honest pros and cons. Every tool has strengths and weaknesses. We don't sugarcoat bad experiences or downplay genuine advantages.

Get in Touch

Have a question, suggestion, or want to report an error? We'd love to hear from you.

hello@aitools.dev
